nodes.name: Ornate melidectes
nodes.summary: The ornate melidectes or ornate honeyeater (Melidectes torquatus) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is found in the New Guinea Highlands. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. References

nodes.name: Ornate melidectes
nodes.summary: Ornate melidectes（Melidectes torquatus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Ornate melidectes。

nodes.name: Melidectes
nodes.summary: Melidectes（Melidectes）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联6种鸟类，如Ornate melidectes、Cinnamon-browed melidectes、Vogelkop melidectes等6种鸟类。
